## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature clearly. Include any UI sketches or flow descriptions if helpful.

## User Role Affected

- [ ] Parent
- [ ] Teacher
- [ ] Admin
- [ ] All roles

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why is your proposal better?

## Additional Context

Any links, references, or screenshots that support this request.
